rationale.R1.3: The output does not explicitly audit every claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents all recommendations as equally confident without acknowledging uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly covers the requested dimensions, with a minor drift towards discussing broader implications of the method.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The output provides some traceability but lacks detailed annotations for every non-cosmetic change.
